tagline.en: Half of what beginners 'know' about Cloudflare is a myth — can you tell which?
tagline.zh: 初學者對 Cloudflare 的「常識」一半是迷思，你分得出來嗎？

text.en: Cloudflare Workers are just like AWS Lambda containers.
text.zh: Cloudflare Workers 跟 AWS Lambda 的容器一樣。

explain.en: Workers run on V8 isolates, not containers, so cold starts are near zero.
explain.zh: Workers 跑在 V8 isolate 上而非容器，所以幾乎沒有冷啟動。

text.en: You must own and run a server to use D1.
text.zh: 要用 D1 就一定得自己擁有並維運伺服器。

explain.en: D1 is a fully managed serverless SQL database — there's no server to run.
explain.zh: D1 是全託管的無伺服器 SQL 資料庫，不用自己維運伺服器。

text.en: Cloudflare Pages can only host static sites.
text.zh: Cloudflare Pages 只能放靜態網站。

explain.en: Pages Functions add serverless backend logic, so it's not static-only.
explain.zh: Pages Functions 可加上無伺服器後端邏輯，不只是靜態。

text.en: KV is a great choice as your main transactional database.
text.zh: KV 很適合當主要的交易型資料庫。

explain.en: KV is eventually consistent and built for reads, not transactions — use D1 instead.
explain.zh: KV 是最終一致、為讀取而生，不適合交易，該用 D1。

text.en: Turnstile shows users puzzle challenges like reCAPTCHA.
text.zh: Turnstile 會像 reCAPTCHA 那樣丟拼圖驗證給使用者。

explain.en: Turnstile is usually invisible and rarely shows a puzzle to real users.
explain.zh: Turnstile 通常是隱形的，幾乎不會對真人顯示拼圖。

text.en: R2 is S3-compatible, so many S3 tools and SDKs work with it.
text.zh: R2 相容 S3，所以許多 S3 工具與 SDK 都能直接用。

explain.en: R2 offers an S3-compatible API, making migration from S3 straightforward.
explain.zh: R2 提供 S3 相容 API，從 S3 搬遷很順手。

text.zh: Vectorize 是用來存關聯式 SQL 資料表的。

explain.en: Vectorize is a vector database for embeddings and similarity search, not SQL tables.
explain.zh: Vectorize 是存向量嵌入、做相似度搜尋的向量資料庫，不是 SQL 表。

text.en: R2 charges you egress fees every time files are downloaded.
text.zh: R2 每次下載檔案都要收流出費。

explain.en: R2 has zero egress fees — that's its headline advantage over S3.
explain.zh: R2 流出免費，這正是它勝過 S3 的招牌。

text.en: Workers run your code close to users at the network edge.
text.zh: Workers 會在靠近使用者的網路邊緣執行你的程式碼。

explain.en: Workers deploy to Cloudflare's global edge network, running near each user.
explain.zh: Workers 部署到 Cloudflare 全球邊緣網路，就近於每位使用者執行。

text.en: A free Cloudflare account is required before you can buy SSL certificates separately.
text.zh: 用 Cloudflare 前要先另外付費購買 SSL 憑證。

explain.en: Cloudflare provides free, automatic SSL/TLS certificates — no separate purchase needed.
explain.zh: Cloudflare 提供免費且自動的 SSL/TLS 憑證，不必另外購買。

text.en: Durable Objects give you strong consistency for coordinated state.
text.zh: Durable Objects 能為需要協調的狀態提供強一致性。

explain.en: Each Durable Object is a single authoritative instance, giving strong consistency.
explain.zh: 每個 Durable Object 都是唯一的權威實例，因此具備強一致性。

text.en: Cloudflare is only a CDN and can't run application code.
text.zh: Cloudflare 只是 CDN，不能執行應用程式的程式碼。

explain.en: Beyond the CDN, Cloudflare runs full apps with Workers, Pages, D1, R2 and more.
explain.zh: 除了 CDN，Cloudflare 還能用 Workers、Pages、D1、R2 等跑完整應用。
